title: Spaghetti
instructions:
1. Boil pasta.
2. Season and cook ground beef in a pan.
3. Combine all.

title: Gingerbread Butterscotch Cookies
instructions:
Preheat oven to 330f.
Mix wet ingredients.
Slowly add dry ingredients.
Add butterscotch chips.
Place teaspoon sized dough onto greased baking pan.
Bake until dough does not appear wet.

title: Vegetable Venison or Beef Soup
instructions:
Brown meat in a stockpot.
Add water and tomatoes.
Chop and add vegetables, bouillon, spices, and barley.
Bring to a boil, reduce heat, and simmer about 30 minutes until vegetables are tender.

title: Roasted Acorn Squash Soup
instructions:
Roast halved squash until soft.
Sauté celery, carrots, and onion in butter.
Scoop squash flesh into pan with broth and simmer 25–30 minutes.
Blend until smooth, then stir in cream and lemon juice and season.

title: Garden Vietnamese Ginger Noodle Soup (Chicken Pho)
instructions:
Sauté onion and garlic in oil.
Brown chicken with carrots and broccoli.
Add broth, soy sauce, lime juice, ginger, and whole spices and simmer about 30 minutes.
Cook noodles separately.
Serve soup over noodles with herbs and lime.

title: Zucchini and Brown Rice Soup
instructions:
Cook rice in broth until tender.
Sauté onion in butter, add zucchini briefly, then greens until wilted.
Stir vegetable mixture into rice, season, and serve warm.

title: Lentil and Chicken Soup
instructions:
Cook tomatoes, onion, and garlic in pot.
Add oil, broth, and chicken and bring to a boil.
Add lentils and simmer until lentils are tender and chicken cooked.
Shred chicken before serving.

title: Veggie Soup
instructions:
Chop vegetables and roast until soft.
Transfer to pot with broth or water.
Blend if desired and season to taste.

title: Butternut Squash Soup
instructions:
Roast seasoned squash until tender.
Sauté apple and onion in oil.
Add squash, broth, and milk, simmer 20 minutes.
Blend until smooth.

title: Fresh Tomato Soup
instructions:
Sauté onions and leeks.
Add vegetables and cook until thick.
Stir in flour, then add broth and simmer.
Add parsley and season.
Blend if desired.

title: Summer Beet Salad
instructions:
Boil beets until tender, peel and slice.
Toast walnuts.
Whisk dressing ingredients.
Toss beets with dressing, walnuts, scallions, and cheese.

title: Three Bean Salad
instructions:
Drain beans and combine with chopped vegetables.
Whisk vinegar, sugar, and oil and pour over salad.
Toss well and chill or serve at room temperature.

title: Tabbouli
instructions:
Soak bulgur in hot water, then drain and squeeze dry.
Mix vegetables with lemon juice and salt.
Add bulgur and chill.
Stir in olive oil and mint before serving.

title: Quinoa Veggie Salad in a Pita
instructions:
Cook quinoa if needed.
Whisk dressing ingredients.
Toss all vegetables and quinoa with dressing.
Fill pita halves and serve.

title: Thai Cucumber Salad
instructions:
Whisk vinegar, sugar, oil, salt, and pepper flakes.
Add sliced cucumbers, peanuts, and green onions.
Toss and serve chilled.
